title: 112 年國中教育會考 - 英語聽力
subject: 英語聽力

questions.text:
5. 作答時請將答案直接畫記在答案卡上，並塗黑、塗滿。考試結束的鐘 聲響起，若未填答完成，其責任由考生自負，不得提出異議。 作答方式： 請依照題意從各題選項中選出一個正確或最佳的答案，並用 **2B** 鉛筆 在答案卡上相應的位置畫記，請務必將選項塗黑、塗滿。如果需要修 改答案，請使用橡皮擦擦拭乾淨，重新塗黑答案。例如答案為 **B** ，則 將 選項塗黑、塗滿，即： - 以下為錯誤的畫記方式，可能導致電腦無法正確判讀。如： —未將選項塗滿 —未將選項塗黑 —未擦拭乾淨 —塗出選項外 —同時塗兩個選項 請聽到鐘聲響起，於試題本右上角方 格內填寫准考證末兩碼，再翻頁作答 --- ## 第一部分：辨識句意 ( 第 1 - 3 題 ) 作答說明：每題均有三張圖片，請依據所聽到的句子，選出符合描述的圖片，每題播放 兩次。 ## 示例題：你會看到 **----- Start of picture text -----**
(A) (B) (C)
**----- End of picture text -----**
然後你會聽到…… ( 播音 ) 。依據所播放的內容，正確答案應該選 A ，請將答案卡該題 「 」的地方塗黑、塗滿，即： ## 第 1 題 **----- Start of picture text -----**
(A) (B) (C)
**----- End of picture text -----**
## 第 2 題 **----- Start of picture text -----**
(A) (B)
**----- End of picture text -----**
**----- Start of picture text -----**
(C)
**----- End of picture text -----**
1 請翻頁繼續作答 --- ## 第 3 題 **----- Start of picture text -----**
(A) (B) (C)
**----- End of picture text -----**
## 第二部分：基本問答 ( 第 4 - 11 題 ) 作答說明：每題均有三個選項，請依據所聽到的內容，選出一個最適合的回應，每題播 放兩次。 示例題：你會看到 - (A) She is talking to the teacher. - (B) She is a student in my class. - (C) She is wearing a beautiful dress. 然後你會聽到…… ( 播音 ) 。依據所播放的內容，正確回應應該選 B ，請將答案卡該題「 」 的地方塗黑、塗滿，即： ## 第 4 題 - (A) Tea eggs are my favorite. - (B) We have thirty-five dollars. - (C) There are five in the refrigerator. ## 第 5 題 - (A) Oh, you’re hungry, too? - (B) Why not? That’s my seat. - (C) Oh, sorry. I didn’t know that. ## 第 6 題 - (A) I like dogs very much. - (B) I usually go swimming. - (C) I exercise three times a week. 2 --- ## 第 7 題 - (A) She said yes. - (B) She enjoyed it. - (C) She is very fast. ## 第 8 題 - (A) No, I haven’t. - (B) Good, thanks. - (C) How are you? ## 第 9 題 - (A) Where did you find him? - (B) Oh yeah, I’ve already told him. - (C) Wait a minute, please. I’ll get him for you. ## 第 10 題 - (A) Well, it’s good to know. - (B) Well, I don’t remember. - (C) Well, he won’t listen to me. ## 第 11 題 - (A) Yes, I’ll order now. - (B) Yes, I can have a drink. - (C) Yes, I’ll have a coffee, please. ## 第三部分：言談理解 ( 第 12 - 21 題 ) 作答說明：每題均有三個選項，請依據所聽到的對話或短文內容，選出一個最適合的答 案，每題播放兩次。 示例題：你會看到 (A) 9:50. (B) 10:00. (C) 10:10. 然後你會聽到…… ( 播音 ) 。依據所播放的內容，正確答案應該選 B ，請將答案卡該題「 」 的地方塗黑、塗滿，即： ## 第 12 題 - (A) The girl’s brother. - (B) The girl’s neighbor. - (C) The girl’s classmate. 3 請翻頁繼續作答 --- ## 第 13 題 - (A) She needs to study. - (B) She isn’t wearing sports shoes. - (C) She doesn’t like to play basketball. ## 第 14 題 - (A) To keep themselves safe. - (B) To help move their desks. - (C) To do exercises with their teachers. ## 第 15 題 - (A) Because her show was not successful. - (B) Because she got a bad seat in the theater. - (C) Because he did not stay until the end of the show. ## 第 16 題 - (A) She was in Mr. Anderson’s class. - (B) She asked a lot of questions in class. - (C) She started a study group for the class. ## 第 17 題 - (A) The woman likes pies from the bakery. - (B) The pie the man made last year tasted bad. - (C) The man will be too tired from making pies. ## 第 18 題 **----- Start of picture text -----**
(A) (B) (C)
**----- End of picture text -----**
4 --- 第 19 題 - (A) In a restroom. - (B) In a restaurant. - (C) In a movie theater. ## 第 20 題 - (A) Ideas for creating a painting. - (B) The stories behind a painting. - (C) Tips for understanding a painting. ## 第 21 題 - (A) They have no idea at the moment. - (B) They’ll ask them to stop the noise right away. - (C) They’ll have a meeting with them the next day. ## 聽力試題播音完畢 5 試題結束
